calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-18-2015 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-08-2015 Continued To Jun-22-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Petition To Compel Trustee To Account And Report Information Relating To The Administration Fo The Trust And To Distribute Specific Gifts.
Off Calendar Apr-29-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard: PTR-12-296277 The Edward L. Hee and Bernadette W. Hee Living Trust and PTR-12-296329 The Mimi L. Ralph Trust

Appearances: Lynn Searle for and with Linda Hee (Petitioner). Bradley Kass for Brian Hee (Trustee).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. The accounting petitions and the petitions to compel full account, report and return property to Trust, etc. in both matters were referred to the department of the Presiding Judge (206) to be set for trial, (order for the same signed in open court). The Court suspended Edward Hee's powers as Trustee and appointed Linda Hee as temporary Successor Trustee until further order of the Court. Linda Hee has no authority to sell any real property of the Trust. Bond is set at $50,000.00 (amount of income the property receives). Trust records/documents for the Tennessee property leases, bank accounts, etc. and any information/documents relating to the Molden Partnership assets are to be turned over by May 14, 2014. Ms. Searle is to prepare the order.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition To Compel Trustee To Account And Report Information Relating To The Administration Fo The Trust And To Distribute Specific Gifts.
Off Calendar Mar-11-2014 Continued To Apr-29-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel Trustee To Account And Report Information Relating To The Administration Fo The Trust And To Distribute Specific Gifts.
Off Calendar Feb-25-2014 Continued To Mar-11-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel Trustee To Account And Report Information Relating To The Administration Fo The Trust And To Distribute Specific Gifts.
Off Calendar Dec-03-2013 Continued To Feb-25-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard: PTR-12-296277 The Edward L. Hee and Bernadette W. Hee Living Trust and PTR-12-296329 The Mimi L. Ralph Trust.

Appearances: Lynn Searle for and with Linda Hee (Beneficiary). Bradley Kass for Brian Hee (Trustee).

Mr. Kass stated that the accounting was filed yesterday, that they may need to supplement it, that the proof of service to Bernadette was submitted to the Clerk and returned by the Clerk, that it was sent to file and serve in August, that it is not showing up, that he needs to follow up on it and that he will refile it if needed. Ms. Searle stated she was not aware the accounting was filed, that she has not received it, that they are having difficulty receiving documents (bank statements, tax returns) from Brian Hee and that there is some objection to producing said documents. Mr. Kass stated that they will produce what ever documents they have, that do not have the first six months of the Smith Barney account and that the Tennessee property is managed by Brian. The Court stated that they need to decide if they need to partition the property or have an independent property manager. The Petitions to Compel Full Account, etc. and the accounting petition were continued to February 25, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition To Compel Trustee To Account And Report Information Relating To The Administration Fo The Trust And To Distribute Specific Gifts.
Off Calendar Oct-16-2013 Continued To Dec-03-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status (Matter Trails Status In Case No. 296277, Hee Trust)
Off Calendar Oct-08-2013 Off Calendar

Petition To Compel Trustee To Account And Report Information Relating To The Administration Fo The Trust And To Distribute Specific Gifts.
Off Calendar Sep-10-2013 Continued To Oct-16-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with Case No. PTR-12-296277, The Edward L. Hee and Bernadette W. Hee Living Trust.

Appearances: Bradley Kass for Brian Hee (Trustee). Lynn Searle for Linda Hee.

Extensive discussions held with regard to both Trusts/petitions. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the Trusts and Mr. Hee's fiduciary duty to account, etc. Both matters were continued to October 16, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on the filing of an accounting by Brian Hee for the period covering 2002 to the date of death in the Hee Trust (296277), the petition in the Ralph Trust (296329) will trail.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Petition To Compel Trustee To Account And Report Information Relating To The Administration Fo The Trust And To Distribute Specific Gifts.
Off Calendar Aug-14-2013 Continued To Sep-10-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Compel Trustee To Account And Report Information Relating To The Administration Fo The Trust And To Distribute Specific Gifts.
Off Calendar Jul-02-2013 Continued To Aug-26-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: The following cases were heard: PTR-12-296277 The Edward L. Hee and Bernadette W. Hee Living Trust and PTR-12-296329 The Mimi L. Ralph Trust.

Appearances: Bradley Kass for Brian Hee (Respondent). Lynn Searle for and with Linda Hee and for Aaron Hee.

Mr. Kass stated that settlement is still being pursued, that they made a disbursement of $25,000.00 on the Ralph Estate, that there is an issue in the Hee with expanding the accounting and going back further, and asked to continue the Hee matter and take the Ralph matter off calendar. Ms. Searle stated that they received some information on the Ralph matter for 2012 and 2013 only, requested a hearing date for an evidentiary hearing on issue of capacity in the Hee matter and objected to taking the Ralph matter off calendar. Mr. Kass stated that he is willing to provide information regarding capacity to Ms. Searle but that they don't have much on medical records. All matters were continued to August 26, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on setting of an evidentiary hearing on the issue of capacity.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley.
